---
title: "BlogDemo"
output: html_document
---
# Set Working Directory to where you want your blog to be housed locally

setwd("C:\\Users\\Spot\\Documents\\GitHub\\s-vargas.github.io")

#Install blogdown
install.packages('blogdown')

# Load it in to the current environment.

library(blogdown)

#I found it and liked the hello friend blog theme from the user panr

new_site(theme = "panr/hugo-theme-hello-friend")


#Edit the details in the toml file.

#Then Rebuild the site
build_site()

#Then drag and drop in your github
